brushLayer.description: Blob hash for the brush layer.

image.description: Blob hash for the source image layer.

inpainted.description: Blob hash for the inpainted layer.

rendered.description: Blob hash for the rendered composite layer.

segment.description: Blob hash for the segmentation mask layer.

PipelineConfig.description:
Engine selection for each pipeline stage.
Values are engine IDs (e.g. "pp-doclayout-v3", "comic-text-detector").
Empty string means use default.

api_key.description:
Populated from the keyring on `load()`, never written to config.toml.
Serializes as `"[REDACTED]"` in API responses.
Populated from keyring on `load()`. Serializes as `"[REDACTED]"`.

renderX.description: Actual render area position/size (when bubble expansion is used).

rendered.description: Blob hash for the rendered text block sprite.
